mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AR.ERROR_CNT, 0) AS ERROR_CNT, COALESCE(AR.WARN_CNT, 0) AS WARN_CNT, COALESCE(AR.NORMAL_CNT, 0) AS NORMAL_CNT, COALESCE(AR.INFO_CNT, 0) AS INFO_CNT, COALESCE(AR.UNKNOWN_CNT, 0) AS UNKNOWN_CNT, COALESCE(AR.ERROR_RATIO, 0) AS ERROR_RATIO, COALESCE(AR.WARN_RATIO, 0) AS WARN_RATIO, COALESCE(AR.NORMAL_RATIO, 0) AS NORMAL_RATIO, COALESCE(AR.INFO_RATIO, 0) AS INFO_RATIO, COALESCE(AR.UNKNOWN_RATIO, 0) AS UNKNOWN_RATIO, COALESCE(CH.COLLECT_SUCCESS, 0) AS COLLECT_SUCCESS, COALESCE(CH.COLLECT_TOTAL, 0) AS COLLECT_TOTAL, COALESCE(CH.COLLECT_FAIL, 0) AS COLLECT_FAIL, COALESCE(CH.COLLECT_SKIP, 0) AS COLLECT_SKIP, COALESCE(AH.ANALYZE_SUCCESS, 0) AS ANALYZE_SUCCESS, COALESCE(AH.ANALYZE_TOTAL, 0) AS ANALYZE_TOTAL, COALESCE(AH.ANALYZE_FAIL, 0) AS ANALYZE_FAIL, COALESCE(CH.COLLECT_RATIO, 0) AS COLLECT_RATIO, COALESCE(AH.ANALYZE_RATIO, 0) AS ANALYZE_RATIO FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '에러' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ERROR_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '경고' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WARN_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '정상' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NORMAL_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '정보' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INFO_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '미분석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UNKNOWN_CNT, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '에러' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) END AS ERROR_RATIO, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '경고' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) END AS WARN_RATIO, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '정상' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) END AS NORMAL_RATIO, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '정보' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) END AS INFO_RATIO, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ANALYZE_LEVEL = '미분석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) END AS UNKNOWN_RATIO FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} ) AR CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SERVER_ID) AS COLLECT_TOTAL, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COLLECT_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN SERVER_ID END) AS COLLECT_SUCCESS, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COLLECT_STATUS = 'FAIL' THEN SERVER_ID END) AS COLLECT_FAIL, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COLLECT_STATUS = 'SKIP' THEN SERVER_ID END) AS COLLECT_SKIP, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT SERVER_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COLLECT_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN SERVER_ID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT SERVER_ID), 2) END AS COLLECT_RATIO FROM TB_COLLECT_HISTORY WHERE COLLECT_DATE = #{today} ) CH CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SERVER_ID) AS ANALYZE_TOTAL, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ANALYZE_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN SERVER_ID END) AS ANALYZE_SUCCESS, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ANALYZE_STATUS = 'FAIL' THEN SERVER_ID END) AS ANALYZE_FAIL, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT SERVER_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ANALYZE_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN SERVER_ID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT SERVER_ID), 2) END AS ANALYZE_RATIO FROM TB_ANALYZE_HISTORY WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} ) AH

SELECT DISTINCT SERVER_ID AS "serverId", FAIL_REASON AS "failReason" FROM TB_COLLECT_HISTORY WHERE COLLECT_DATE = #{today} AND COLLECT_STATUS = #{status} AND FAIL_REASON IS NOT NULL ORDER BY SERVER_ID

SELECT DISTINCT SERVER_ID AS "serverId", FAIL_REASON AS "failReason" FROM TB_ANALYZE_HISTORY WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND ANALYZE_STATUS = #{status} AND FAIL_REASON IS NOT NULL ORDER BY SERVER_ID

if.test: serverId != null and serverId != '' and serverId != '전체'

mapper.select:
SELECT ANALYZE_RESULT_ID, COLLECT_LOG_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, LOG_TYPE, LOG_ID, LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_VALUE, ANALYZE_LEVEL, ANALYZE_MESSAGE, THRESHOLD_VALUE, THRESHOLD_OPERATOR, WARNING_RATIO, NOTIFY_YN, NOTIFY_AT, ANALYZE_DATE, ANALYZE_DATETIME, COLLECT_DATE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND ANALYZE_LEVEL IN ('에러', '경고')
ORDER BY CASE ANALYZE_LEVEL WHEN '에러' THEN 1 WHEN '경고' THEN 2 END, LOG_TIMESTAMP DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT ANALYZE_RESULT_ID, COLLECT_LOG_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, LOG_TYPE, LOG_ID, LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_VALUE, ANALYZE_LEVEL, ANALYZE_MESSAGE, THRESHOLD_VALUE, THRESHOLD_OPERATOR, WARNING_RATIO, NOTIFY_YN, NOTIFY_AT, ANALYZE_DATE, ANALYZE_DATETIME, COLLECT_DATE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND ANALYZE_LEVEL IN ('에러', '경고')
ORDER BY CASE ANALYZE_LEVEL WHEN '에러' THEN 1 WHEN '경고' THEN 2 END, LOG_TIMESTAMP DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND ANALYZE_LEVEL IN ('에러', '경고')

SELECT ANALYZE_RESULT_ID, COLLECT_LOG_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, LOG_TYPE, LOG_ID, LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_VALUE, ANALYZE_LEVEL, ANALYZE_MESSAGE, THRESHOLD_VALUE, THRESHOLD_OPERATOR, WARNING_RATIO, NOTIFY_YN, NOTIFY_AT, ANALYZE_DATE, ANALYZE_DATETIME, COLLECT_DATE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND ANALYZE_LEVEL IN ('정상', '정보', '미분석')
ORDER BY LOG_TIMESTAMP DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT ANALYZE_RESULT_ID, COLLECT_LOG_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, LOG_TYPE, LOG_ID, LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_VALUE, ANALYZE_LEVEL, ANALYZE_MESSAGE, THRESHOLD_VALUE, THRESHOLD_OPERATOR, WARNING_RATIO, NOTIFY_YN, NOTIFY_AT, ANALYZE_DATE, ANALYZE_DATETIME, COLLECT_DATE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND ANALYZE_LEVEL IN ('정상', '정보', '미분석')
ORDER BY LOG_TIMESTAMP DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND ANALYZE_LEVEL IN ('정상', '정보', '미분석')

SELECT S.SERVER_ID AS "serverId", ( SELECT MAX(COLLECT_END_AT) FROM TB_COLLECT_HISTORY CH WHERE CH.COLLECT_DATE = #{today} AND CH.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID AND CH.COLLECT_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' ) AS "collectAt", ( SELECT MAX(ANALYZE_END_AT) FROM TB_ANALYZE_HISTORY AH WHERE AH.ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND AH.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID AND AH.ANALYZE_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' ) AS "analyzeAt", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT AR WHERE AR.ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND AR.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID AND AR.ANALYZE_LEVEL = '에러' ) AS "errorCnt", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT AR WHERE AR.ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND AR.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID AND AR.ANALYZE_LEVEL = '경고' ) AS "warningCnt" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SERVER_ID FROM TB_ANALYZE_HISTORY WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} ) S ORDER BY S.SERVER_ID

SELECT ANALYZE_RESULT_ID, COLLECT_LOG_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, LOG_TYPE, LOG_ID, LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_VALUE, ANALYZE_LEVEL, ANALYZE_MESSAGE, THRESHOLD_VALUE, THRESHOLD_OPERATOR, WARNING_RATIO, NOTIFY_YN, NOTIFY_AT, ANALYZE_DATE, ANALYZE_DATETIME, COLLECT_DATE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND SERVER_ID = #{serverId} AND LOG_ID = #{logId} ORDER BY LOG_TIMESTAMP ASC

SELECT S.SERVER_ID AS "serverId", AR.LOG_VALUE AS "logValue", AR.ANALYZE_LEVEL AS "analyzeLevel", AR.THRESHOLD_VALUE AS "thresholdValue", AR.LOG_TIMESTAMP AS "logTimestamp" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SERVER_ID FROM TB_ANALYZE_HISTORY WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} ) S LEFT JOIN TB_ANALYZE_RESULT AR ON AR.ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND AR.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID AND AR.LOG_ID = 'DISK_HOME' AND AR.LOG_TYPE = '수치' AND AR.LOG_TIMESTAMP = ( SELECT MAX(LOG_TIMESTAMP) FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID AND LOG_ID = 'DISK_HOME' AND LOG_TYPE = '수치' ) ORDER BY S.SERVER_ID

SELECT AR.ANALYZE_RESULT_ID, AR.COLLECT_LOG_ID, AR.SERVER_ID, AR.SERVER_IP, AR.LOG_TYPE, AR.LOG_ID, AR.LOG_TIMESTAMP, AR.LOG_CONTENT, AR.LOG_VALUE, AR.ANALYZE_LEVEL, AR.ANALYZE_MESSAGE, AR.THRESHOLD_VALUE, AR.THRESHOLD_OPERATOR, AR.WARNING_RATIO, AR.NOTIFY_YN, AR.NOTIFY_AT, AR.ANALYZE_DATE, AR.ANALYZE_DATETIME, AR.COLLECT_DATE, AR.CREATED_AT FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT AR JOIN ( SELECT MAX(LOG_TIMESTAMP) AS MAX_TS FROM TB_ANALYZE_RESULT WHERE ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND SERVER_ID = #{serverId} AND LOG_ID = #{logId} ) T ON AR.LOG_TIMESTAMP = T.MAX_TS WHERE AR.ANALYZE_DATE = #{today} AND AR.SERVER_ID = #{serverId} AND AR.LOG_ID = #{logId}

SELECT COLLECT_LOG_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, LOG_TYPE, LOG_ID, LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_VALUE, RAW_LOG, SOURCE_FILE_PATH, COLLECT_DATETIME, COLLECT_DATE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_COLLECT_LOG WHERE COLLECT_LOG_ID = #{collectLogId}
